outputs.name: kv_cache_k
outputs.desc: K cache slice at current pos

outputs.name: kv_cache_v
outputs.desc: V cache slice at current pos

impl.c_declaration: void kv_cache_store(float *kv_cache_k, float *kv_cache_v, const float *k, const float *v, int layer, int pos, int num_kv_heads, int head_dim, int max_seq_len);
impl.inline_code: /* KV cache store is inlined as memcpy in codegen */

notes: Store K and V to KV cache at current position. Typically inlined as memcpy in generated code.
